description: Leather loafers from arrow for men with a refined, stacked heel. A spin off of the classic penny loafers, this mid-top pair has an elasticated split above its mouth. Wear this with semi-formal ensembles Upper Leather upper with stitch detailing Reinforced overlay on the heel for support to the ankle Slip on styling with elasticated seam above the tongue for ease of wearability Leather lining Padded tongue Soft sockliner for instep comfort Brand badge on the midfoot Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Branding grooves on the midfoot for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
